metadata.description: TUI implementation tickets for GOgent Fortress

tickets.title: Agent Lifecycle Telemetry
tickets.description: Create a new telemetry subsystem that tracks agent spawn and completion events in real-time. This enables the TUI to display live agent delegation status.

tickets.title: CLI Subprocess Management
tickets.description: Implement a Go subprocess manager for embedding Claude CLI directly in the TUI. The subprocess communicates via NDJSON streams on stdin/stdout using Claude's --input-format stream-json and --output-format stream-json flags.

tickets.title: Performance Dashboard Shell
tickets.description: Create the main dashboard shell component that provides navigation structure and layout management for all TUI views. This is the container that hosts Claude panel, agent tree, and performance views.

tickets.title: Auto-Restart on Panic
tickets.description: Implement automatic restart behavior for the Claude subprocess when it crashes or exits unexpectedly. The TUI should seamlessly resume the session without user intervention.

tickets.title: File Watchers for Telemetry
tickets.description: Implement file watching infrastructure to enable real-time updates in the TUI. The TUI needs to react to changes in telemetry JSONL files as hooks write to them.

tickets.title: Event System Integration
tickets.description: Define Go structs for all Claude CLI stream-json event types received from the subprocess.

tickets.title: Agent Tree Model
tickets.description: Create the data model for tracking agent delegation tree with spawn/complete correlation.

tickets.title: Tree View Component
tickets.description: Bubble Tea component that renders the agent delegation tree with status indicators and selection.

tickets.title: Agent Detail Sidebar
tickets.description: Detail panel showing full information about the selected agent.

tickets.title: Claude Conversation Panel
tickets.description: Bubble Tea component for Claude CLI interaction with streaming output display.

tickets.title: 70/30 Layout Integration
tickets.description: Integrate Claude panel with agent tree in 70/30 split layout.

tickets.title: Persistent Banner
tickets.description: Persistent vim-style top banner with navigation tabs and session info.

tickets.title: Session Management
tickets.description: Session picker, history, and continuation support.
